raw.problem: Small Indian cities have no economic path to recycle plastic waste.
raw.opportunity_size: 12M tonnes/yr of plastic waste in India; ~$40B addressable recovery market.
raw.why_now: EPR rules now mandate producer takeback, creating guaranteed feedstock.
raw.success_scenario: If EPR enforcement tightens, demand becomes mandatory.
raw.team_edge: Deep municipal relationships and local logistics know-how.

structured.tagline: Small Indian cities gain a profitable path to recycle plastic waste.
structured.problem: Small Indian cities have no economic path to recycle plastic waste.
structured.opportunity_size: 12M tonnes/yr of plastic waste in India; ~$40B addressable recovery market.
structured.differentiator: EaaS model backed by deep municipal relationships and local logistics expertise.
structured.solution: Equipment-as-a-service plastic recycling pilots in small cities.
structured.ask: Seeking pilot partners among urban local bodies.
